title: WAVE D: J-cut audio-leads-picture (documentary style)
script:
The forest wakes before dawn. [Visual: forest] [KenBurns: on]
A single deer steps into the clearing. [Visual: deer] [KenBurns: on]
Silence, then the river answers. [Visual: river]

title: WAVE D: J-cut + zoomblur + teal palette + kinetic + progress (square)
script:
Cities move while we sleep. [Visual: city night] [Kinetic: on] [Transition: zoomblur]
Lights paint the dark. [Visual: skyline] [Kinetic: on] [Transition: fade]
Every window a story. [Visual: street] [Kinetic: on] [Transition: slide]

title: WAVE D: J-cut + warm palette + emoji (portrait)
script:
Mornings begin with a ritual. [Visual: coffee] [Kinetic: on]
The first sip wakes the world. [Visual: cafe] [Kinetic: on]
Small moments, daily. [Visual: warm light] [Kinetic: on]
